name: harness
description: Codex-native harness meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent systems, reusable skills, and optional plugin packages for a target project.

interface.shortDescription: Design Codex harnesses, roles, and skills
interface.longDescription: Build Codex-native harness packages that analyze a project, choose an orchestration pattern, define reusable specialist roles, and generate the skills and plugin scaffolding needed to repeat the workflow.
defaultPrompt: Build a Codex harness for this project
Design a reusable Codex agent workflow for this repo
Create a plugin and skills that package this team workflow
